name: LAMP Stack
description: Linux + Apache + MySQL + PHP 经典 Web 开发环境
cloud_init:
apt-get install -y apache2 mysql-server php php-mysql php-curl php-gd php-xml php-mbstring php-zip composer
systemctl enable apache2 mysql
systemctl start apache2 mysql
mysql -e "ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY '$(openssl rand -base64 24)'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
a2enmod rewrite
systemctl restart apache2
